creator: danmcgrath.ca@gmail.com
text:
Just curious if MySQL 5.6 (mysql56-server-5.6.35_7) is ever going to be patched for the latest round of CVE's? It's been like this for over a month now, I think?

#> pkg audit
mysql56-server-5.6.35_7 is vulnerable:
MySQL -- mulitiple vulnerabilities
CVE: CVE-2017-3468
